name: Guest Mode Card
description: Shows a guest-ready home card with Wi-Fi QR, house rules, checkout time, nearby cafes, and smart-home instructions.

nativeSettings.welcomeLine: Welcome home. Everything important is right here.
nativeSettings.checkoutNote: Leave keys on the kitchen table and pull the door closed.
nativeSettings.houseRules:
Quiet hours after 22:00
No smoking indoors
Please separate recycling
nativeSettings.nearbyCafes:
Milo Coffee - 3 min walk
Corner Bakery - opens 07:30
Northside Espresso - best flat white
nativeSettings.smartHomeInstructions:
Say: Hey Home, set living room to warm
Thermostat: turn the dial gently
Lights: long press the wall switch to dim

configVariants.welcomeLine: Your stay essentials, all in one calm corner.
configVariants.checkoutNote: Message us when you leave so cleaning can start.

Balcony closes at 22:00

Use Away scene before leaving
